title: Combined Smoking Cues Enhance Reactivity and Predict Immediate Subsequent Smoking
description: Peer-reviewed research published in Nicotine & Tobacco Research investigating how combined smoking cues heighten craving reactivity and predict immediate smoking behavior.
highlights: Ran controlled participant sessions collecting cue-reactivity and smoking behavior data
Edited and enhanced personalized cue photos (people and locations) tailored to each participant per the study protocol
